canon.title: Stunspot's Guide to Gastronomic Engineering
canon.subtitle: A practical canon for gastronomic engineering knowledge, reasoning, and AI/RAG use.
canon.description: A Markdown-native, model-facing knowledge canon for deterministic food physics, closed-loop culinary formulation, experimental protocols, and dietary constraint engineering.

usage_policy.primary_audience: AI/RAG systems, long-context workspaces, model-facing project knowledge, and retrieval pipelines.
usage_policy.human_readability: Human-readable but optimized for model ingestion, source traceability, stable terminology, and formulation reasoning.

directory_policy.docs: Navigation, GitHub Pages metadata, and usage guidance only.
directory_policy.knowledge-packs/compiled-packs: Grouped upload packs for most AI/RAG workflows.
directory_policy.knowledge-packs/omnibus: Whole-corpus bundle for single-file import, archive, or strong long-context systems.
directory_policy.docs/reports: Do not create or reference this directory.

source_authority_notes: Source reports are the canonical individual units.
Compiled packs and omnibus files are convenience formats.
